name: Qamar
backstory: Qamar is a sly fennec fox who survived the fall of Al-Rashid by stealing scraps of magic from the Sorcerer's library. She roams the dunes looking for weary travelers to trick, but secretly harbors a soft spot for those seeking lost knowledge.
visualDescription: A sleek fennec fox with unnaturally large, glowing golden ears and intricate henna-like patterns etched into her sandy fur. She floats on a tiny tattered magic carpet, perpetually clutching an oversized calligraphy quill.
